likes.title: Board-legible A-F grading system
likes.detail: The letter grade translates technical posture into an executive-ready format that works across every persona without a methodology lecture.

likes.title: Portfolio-scale vendor triage
likes.detail: Portfolio views make continuous monitoring of thousands of vendors a one-screen weekly workflow with grade distribution at a glance.

likes.title: Instant prospect scorecards
likes.detail: Any company's scorecard is one URL away, which makes the first sales meeting demo effectively zero-setup and data-anchored.

dislikes.title: Issues list lacks score-driver prioritization
dislikes.detail: The issues view lists findings without ranking by score impact, so building a remediation plan requires manual triage in a spreadsheet.
dislikes.customerPain: I cannot tell which three fixes would actually move my score this quarter.

dislikes.title: Scorecard body loads slowly during live moments
dislikes.detail: Header renders fast but the overview body sits on a loading spinner long enough to derail a screen-share.
dislikes.customerPain: When I screen-share this in an exec meeting the page is blank while it loads.
dislikes.firstAction: Instrument p95 time-to-content and add skeleton states.

dislikes.title: Report Center outputs are not audit-committee shaped
dislikes.detail: Many export types but no artifact matching what an audit committee expects (trend, benchmark, dollars-at-risk, SLA table) in one place.
dislikes.customerPain: I still rebuild the board deck by hand from screenshots and CSVs.
dislikes.firstAction: Interview five CISO customers about board-deck assembly.

dislikes.title: Questionnaires feel siloed from ratings
dislikes.detail: Questionnaire responses and the outside-in rating live on separate surfaces with no combined vendor risk view.
dislikes.customerPain: I reconcile questionnaire answers against scores by hand.
dislikes.firstAction: Prototype a unified vendor risk summary combining both signals.

dislikes.title: Score dispute flow is hard to walk customers through
dislikes.detail: Multi-step resolution path with slow feedback turns QBRs into support calls and erodes trust in the score itself.
dislikes.customerPain: My QBR derails into 'why is this IP attributed to us' for 30 minutes.
dislikes.firstAction: Map the dispute journey and count steps to resolution.

kfd.item: Score-impact ranking for the issues list
kfd.customerPain: Issue lists without ranking leave teams guessing what to fix first.
Blank page during live screen-shares undermines exec briefings.
kfd.firstAction: Instrument p95 time-to-content and add skeleton states.

kfd.customerPain: CISOs rebuild board decks manually from platform screenshots.
kfd.firstAction: Interview five CISO customers about board-deck assembly.

kfd.item: A-F letter grade as the universal language
kfd.customerPain: The one artifact every stakeholder already understands; deepen it rather than dilute it.
kfd.firstAction: Ship grade-trend context on every surface where the grade appears.

kfd.customerPain: A cluttered export menu slows every report workflow while maintaining dead formats.
kfd.firstAction: Pull export-usage analytics and deprecate the bottom quartile.
